title: Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Tiruchirappalli operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions!
